word: G1387 - δολιόω - dolióō - dol-ee-o'-o - Use deceit

sections.paragraph:
- Original: δολιόω

- Transliteration: Dolioo

- Phonetic: dol-ee-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to deceive, use deceit

- Origin: from G1386

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1386; to be guileful: - use deceit.
